#   These ASN databases allow you to restrict which companies from accessing your server
#   based on their assigned ASN (Autonomous System Number). They are fully compatible with
#   applications such as ConfigServer Firewall, Wireshark, Elastic Search, NGINX, 
#   Snowplow Analytics, Revive Adserver, OPNSense, etc.
#   
#   A more detailed list is available at:
#       - https://dev.maxmind.com/geoip/docs/databases/#client-apis
